name: ZedPOS
description:
ZedPOS - Smart Retail for Zambia
Are you tired of tracking sales on paper, losing stock, or struggling to calculate taxes at the end of the day? Meet ZedPOS, your all-in-one digital cash register and business manager designed specifically for the Zambian retail market.

Whether you run a grocery store, boutique, pharmacy, or hardware shop, ZedPOS gives you the powerful tools you need to sell faster, track your inventory, and monitor your shop's performance—all from your smartphone, tablet, or computer.

🚀 KEY FEATURES:

• Lightning-Fast Checkout: Ring up customers in seconds. Quickly browse your products, calculate totals, and issue digital or printed receipts instantly.
• Smart Inventory Management: Never run out of your best-sellers. Track your stock levels in real-time and get automatic "Low Stock" alerts so you know exactly when to reorder.
• ZRA Tax Ready: Handle complex taxes effortlessly. ZedPOS automatically calculates Standard VAT (16%), Zero-Rated, and Exempt taxes on every sale, keeping your books perfectly accurate.
• Automated Z-Reports: Close your business day with a single tap. Generate comprehensive Daily and Monthly Z-Reports showing Total Revenue, VAT summaries, and your top-performing products.
• Payment Tracking: Keep a clear record of how your customers are paying. Easily split and track your revenue by Cash and Mobile Money.
• Secure Team Access: Create separate accounts for your cashiers and yourself. Protect your sensitive data and reports with strict "Owner-Only" access locks.

💡 WHY CHOOSE ZEDPOS?

• Simple to Learn: No complicated training or technical skills required. Your cashiers can learn how to make a sale in under 5 minutes.
• Cloud-Synced: Your data is securely backed up to the cloud. Check your shop's live sales from anywhere in the world, at any time.
• No Expensive Hardware: Say goodbye to bulky, expensive legacy systems. Run your entire business right from the Android devices you already own.

Stop guessing about your profits and take total control of your retail business today.

Download ZedPOS now and start your free trial to experience smart, stress-free retail!
